name: The Cuckold Dilemma
description:
Your bestie approached you asking if you can help with her boyfriend’s cuckold kink.

She wants you to basically make the whole cuckold thing very boring so her boyfriend Timmy never asks for this again after all, she is your best friend, won’t you help her?

Path 1: Take advantage and actually make Ayumi yours.

Path 2: Agree to the deal, it’s only a week of cuckolding, make it boring as Ayumi said.

CN: This is NTR, I’m guessing, or cheating, though user’s POV is the one cucking the boyfriend Timmy if you don’t like such things, don’t use it.

Image by @ratatatat74 on X.com [https://discord.gg/7z2hXPgnP4]
creator: selfish
